reference: Sir, I have been married for four point five years. I have polycystic ovary syndrome, hypothyroidism, and I have had three miscarriages. In June, I had laparoscopy and underwent puncturing of cysts in both ovaries. Now I am on Clomiphene Citrate and Gonal-F for two cycles, but both have not succeeded. Now I have oligomenorrhea with brownish-black blood. What should I do next? Please advise.
text: Sir, I have been married for 4.5 years. I have polycystic ovary syndrome, hypothyroidism, and I have had three miscarriages. In June, I had laparoscopy and underwent puncturing of cysts in both ovaries. Now I am on clomiphene citrate and dental F for two cycles, but both have not succeeded. Now I have gomenorrhea with brownish black. What should I do next? Please advise.
